narrative:
Greeneview Local Sd (Greene) school district has 5,599 registered voters, with 47.0% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 44.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.0%, a pronounced Republican lean of 35.1 percentage points. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean -19.0% D−R vs -41.6% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
